page_content:
Residency Reclassification

Residency classifications are made at the time of admission according to the Board of Regents Policy on Student Classification for Admission and Tuition purposes. You are responsible for finding out your residency classification when you are admitted to the university and, if applicable, contesting it within the prescribed deadlines. Please visit the Residency Reclassification website at registrar.umd.edu/residency-reclassification for a full explanation of the policy, relevant forms, resources and frequently asked questions.
